title: knautia purpurea subsp. timeroyi
intro: Knautia purpurea subsp. timeroyi, also known as Timeroy's blanching grass or purple knawia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knautia purpurea subsp. timeroyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
